Center cell (1,1) has 4 live neighbors → dies.

Use the plus/cross pattern: center (1,1) with cells at (0,1),(2,1),(1,0),(1,2) = 4 neighbors of center.

Check that the result does NOT contain [1,1].

This will be degenerate green since implementation is correct.

Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
